trigger: tierFromDemerit 返回 currentTier 当无扣分
wrong_pattern: demote=0 时返回 currentTier，effectiveTier 永远无法升级
correct_pattern: demote=0 时返回 enforced（无约束），让 effectiveTier 能产出比当前 tier 高的候选

trigger: hysteresis 处理 tier_entered_at 空字符串
wrong_pattern: new Date("")|new Date("") 产生 Invalid Date，daysSince=NaN，NaN<7=false 导致 7 天降级保护被静默绕过
correct_pattern: const enteredMs = input.tier_entered_at ? new Date(input.tier_entered_at).getTime() : 0；显式判空再计算

trigger: port 设计测试里 tierFromDemerit 语义
wrong_pattern: 测试写 tierFromDemerit(4, 'stable') → 'stable' 表示无约束时返回 currentTier
correct_pattern: tierFromDemerit 的返回值是死亡链允许的最高 tier；无约束（demote=0）应返回 enforced，测试必须反映此语义

trigger: 跑 ingest --dry-run
wrong_pattern: --dry-run|dry-run|dryRun|以为 dry-run 不花 LLM 费用
correct_pattern: dry-run 只跳过 store.add；extractor/L1/L2 仍会调用 LLM。想零 LLM 预览用 --from-git/--from-ci 半自动源
reasoning: ingest-pipeline 的 dryRun 只是 store.add 的 bypass，不控制 LLM 调用链路——extractor 仍要跑，按源计费

trigger: TypeScript 6.0.3
correct_pattern: TypeScript 6.0 stable patch. Major version — check release blog for breaking changes before upgrade.

trigger: TypeScript 6.0
correct_pattern: TypeScript 6.0 stable release. Major version with breaking changes, see announcement blog.
Vitest bumps flatted for CVE fix. Security-relevant upgrade.
Vitest 4.1: aroundEach/aroundAll hooks, tags, test.extend type inference, mockThrow, agent reporter to cut AI token use, vite 8 beta support, toBe* spy assertions deprecated for toHaveBeen*.
Renames internal `collect` → `import` and removes `prepare` — affects custom reporters/hooks. Also new experimental full task names and `configurePrettyDOM`.
New experimental APIs: extensible test artifact API, OpenTelemetry traces, and fs module cache for perf. Docs linked.

trigger: 用户给出远程/长耗时实验任务并提示还有其他任务要继续
correct_pattern: 主 agent 调用 subagent 执行远程实验，自己保留上下文处理后续任务
reasoning: 长耗时远程实验若占用主 agent 会阻塞后续工作；委派给 subagent 可并行推进，主 agent 保持响应

trigger: subagent 执行远程实验遇到凭据/环境缺失
correct_pattern: 先把凭据/环境持久化到项目配置（增量、不改已有内容），再让 subagent 自主完成；远程实验需先检测空闲显卡避免影响他人
reasoning: 反复追问凭据打断用户节奏；配置应一次记录永久复用。subagent 应自主推进而非报 BLOCKED。共享 GPU 资源需礼让他人实验

trigger: 用户要求介绍系统/项目情况时需判断受众层级
correct_pattern: 按产品经理视角讲架构、流程、关键原理,略过代码级细节
reasoning: 默认倾向给技术细节会淹没非技术受众；产品经理需要整体认知(架构/流程/原理)而非实现,讲解粒度要匹配听众心智模型

trigger: 描述 TEAMAGENT_VISIBILITY=verbose 行为时
correct_pattern: verbose = 显示所有事件（含调试细节）
reasoning: 用户明确要求此措辞；保持文档用词与用户偏好一致

trigger: 设计有多个取舍选项的功能（如阻塞 vs 后台）时
correct_pattern: 先选可观察性更强的默认（如阻塞型），但实现上保留切换能力
reasoning: 用户偏好默认走可见/可调试路径以便排查，但不接受硬编码死路；实现应把模式做成配置项而非二选一

trigger: 提供多方案选择后用户已选定方案
correct_pattern: 选定方案后主动提示可配置/可切换的旋钮（如同步↔异步切换），不等用户追问
reasoning: 用户选 A 后立即追问异步切换，说明 sync/async 等关键 trade-off 应在方案中预留开关并主动告知；只给单一模式会让用户反复追问

trigger: 实现 Claude Code 自动化钩子功能（UserPromptSubmit / Stop / PreToolUse 等）
correct_pattern: hook 代码写完后必须在 .claude/settings.local.json 注册对应 hook 事件，并端到端验证触发链路
reasoning: Claude Code hook 由 harness 按 settings.local.json 配置调度，仅有脚本文件不会自动生效；未注册 = 代码形同虚设。自动化能力（如自学习 pipeline）还需 Stop/UserPromptSubmit 等触发事件，手动命令只是 fallback，不能当作闭环

trigger: 声称修复完成或全绿前
correct_pattern: 跑完实际验证命令（构建+启动+测试）并贴出真实输出再宣布完成
reasoning: 用户反复看到 AI 宣称修复完还残留 bug，说明 AI 基于局部证据（如单测绿）就下结论；完成声明必须以端到端验证输出为证据，否则等于骗用户

trigger: AI 声称某目录/文件不存在、或计划文档「还没实现」时，用户已明确指向具体路径
wrong_pattern: 计划文档只是设计文档，还没实现
correct_pattern: 先读用户指向的文件，重新 brainstorm + 补全需求，再拆 task 实现；API key 来源询问用户（如 claude code haiku）
reasoning: AI 未读文件就断言不存在会误导用户；正确做法是先 Read 指定路径、以文件内容为准，再结合用户偏好（如用 haiku 作 token 来源）规划实现

trigger: 收到包含 <local-command-caveat> 标签的消息时
correct_pattern: 忽略 <local-command-caveat> 包裹的消息，除非用户明确要求分析
reasoning: 该标签内容由本地命令自动生成，非用户意图表达；AI 主动响应会污染对话上下文，误把系统噪声当用户指令

trigger: 实施计划文档中有数值参数（如 token 预算、阈值、限制）时，用户在对话中给出了不同的值
correct_pattern: 以用户对话中明确给出的值为准，覆盖计划文档中的默认值
reasoning: 计划文档是起点而非圣经；用户在实施阶段口头修改参数（如将 token 预算从 2000 改为 3000）代表最新决策，AI 必须用对话值而非文档值，否则实现与用户意图不符

trigger: 需要实现一个涉及多组件、多阶段的复杂新系统或功能时
correct_pattern: 按 深度调研 → brainstorm+需求确认 → 设计文档 → 实现计划 → subagent 驱动开发 顺序推进
reasoning: 跳过前期调研和设计阶段直接实现会导致架构返工；完整流水线确保需求对齐后再拆任务，subagent 执行时边界清晰、减少反复

trigger: 用户指向具体文件并要求 brainstorm、补全需求、再拆任务实现
wrong_pattern: 计划文档只是设计文档，还没实现
correct_pattern: 先读用户指向的文件，重新 brainstorm + 补全需求，再拆 task 实现；API key 来源询问用户（如 claude code haiku）
reasoning: AI 未读文件就断言不存在会误导用户；正确做法是先 Read 指定路径、以文件内容为准，再结合用户偏好（如用 haiku 作 token 来源）规划实现

trigger: 设计 pitfall-guard / hook 拦截系统的 benchmark 任务时
correct_pattern: 找一个 baseline 会踩坑（多消耗 token/时间重试）而 teamagent 因提前避坑直接成功的任务——teamagent 应比 baseline 更省时省 token
reasoning: hook deny+retry 路径天然增加开销；真正体现 pitfall-guard 价值的任务应是：baseline 踩坑导致多轮重试浪费，teamagent 一次通过反而更快更省——overhead 为负才能说明系统有净收益

trigger: 收到 <task-notification status="completed"> 消息时
correct_pattern: 立即读取 output-file 并继续后续流程，不再说'等通知'
reasoning: task-notification 本身就是通知；AI 仍说'等通知'说明未识别该消息为触发信号，正确做法是收到后立即处理输出、推进工作流

trigger: 用 Agent(run_in_background=true) 启动后台 agent 后，需要查询其完成状态
correct_pattern: 后台 agent 完成时系统会发 task-notification，包含 task-id、output-file、status、summary；可通过 TaskOutput 工具按 task-id 读取结果
reasoning: Agent(run_in_background=true) 底层走 TaskCreate 机制，完成后 harness 自动发 task-notification 事件；AI 声称'无法手动查状态'是错的，实际有 task-id 可查

trigger: 收到 <task-notification> 消息，status 为 completed
wrong_pattern: 等 C 和 D 通知
correct_pattern: 立即读取 output-file 并继续后续流程，不再说'等通知'
reasoning: task-notification 本身就是通知；AI 仍说'等通知'说明未识别该消息为触发信号，正确做法是收到后立即处理输出、推进工作流

trigger: 后台 subagent 完成、系统发来 task-notification 消息时
wrong_pattern: 等 Agent X 完成后
correct_pattern: 立即读取 output-file，继续后续流程（如 dispatch 下一 Wave）
reasoning: task-notification 本身就是完成信号；收到后仍说'等通知'说明 AI 未识别该消息为触发点，正确做法是收到即处理，不需要额外等待

trigger: 后台 agent 完成，系统发来 task-notification 消息
correct_pattern: 立即读取 output-file 并继续后续流程，不再说'等通知'
reasoning: task-notification 本身就是通知；AI 仍说'等通知'说明未识别该消息为触发信号，正确做法是收到后立即处理输出、推进工作流

trigger: 实现过程中发现跳过计划/测试直接写代码，或自查发现 bug 后想就地修复
wrong_pattern: 没有先写 plan、没有先写测试
correct_pattern: 回退到上一个稳定 milestone，按 plan→test→impl 顺序重新推进
reasoning: 就地修复跳过流程的代码会积累技术债并违反项目约定；用户偏好硬回退而非打补丁，保持 milestone 边界干净

trigger: 设计 Stop hook 或长耗时系统级 hook 阻塞用户继续操作
correct_pattern: Stop hook 改异步后台运行，运行状态写入状态栏提示
reasoning: 同步 stop hook 每次结束都卡住用户后续操作；异步后台执行 + 状态栏可见性既不阻塞流程又保留可观测性

trigger: 用户要求把系统默认显示模式改为'全部显示'/verbose
correct_pattern: 把默认 visibility 从 smart 切到 verbose（显示所有事件）
reasoning: 用户偏好可观测性优先，smart 模式会隐藏部分事件导致不知系统在做什么；verbose 默认能让用户随时看到完整归因链路，便于排查

trigger: Stop hook 在每轮对话后需要扫描会话文件中的新规则冲突
wrong_pattern: parseSessionFile from turn 0、detector.detect 遍历全部 turn、重新发送所有命中
correct_pattern: 维护游标，增量扫描新增 turn，去重已处理；仅在 /new、/clear、/compact、退出、关闭窗口时做完整重扫
reasoning: Stop 每轮触发，全量重扫导致 token 消耗呈平方增长；增量扫描维护游标可避免重复，关键时刻完整重扫确保一致性

trigger: 设计或维护 Wiki / 知识库系统时
wrong_pattern: 手动拉取 + 无清理机制
correct_pattern: 自动化拉取 + 自动清理过时数据
reasoning: 手动维护导致数据陈旧（拉取滞后5天）和无效数据堆积，自动化+清理确保知识及时可用且命中率高

correct_pattern: Vitest 4.1.4: experimental aria snapshot support, public `assertion` field, json reporter `filterMeta` option, import hoisting fix for class-property name collisions.

trigger: Open-weight Kimi K2.6 takes on GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 with agent swarms
correct_pattern: Moonshot Kimi K2.6 open-weight model: 300-agent swarm, 4000-tool-call chains, modified MIT license, available via API + HuggingFace. Competitive with GPT-5.4/Opus 4.6 on coding benchmarks.

trigger: How to Ground a Korean AI Agent in Real Demographics with Synthetic Personas
correct_pattern: Nemotron-Personas-Korea: 7M synthetic Korean personas (KOSIS-grounded, PII-free, CC BY 4.0) for grounding agents. Tutorial uses NVIDIA API + OpenAI-compat client with system-prompt persona injection.

trigger: Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents
correct_pattern: EcomRLVE-Gym: 8 verifiable multi-turn e-commerce environments with adaptive difficulty curriculum for RL agent training. Open-source, Qwen3 8B + DAPO recipe, tool-augmented reward design (task+efficiency+hallucination penalty).

trigger: The PR you would have opened yourself
correct_pattern: Claude Code Skill + test harness to port transformers models to mlx-lm. Install via `uvx hf skills add --claude`. Covers PR conventions, numerical verification, RoPE/dtype pitfalls.

trigger: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
correct_pattern: Finetune multimodal embedding/reranker models with sentence-transformers. Shows Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B VDR finetune (NDCG@10 0.888→0.947), CachedMultipleNegativesRankingLoss + MatryoshkaLoss, processor_kwargs/model_kwargs API.

trigger: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
correct_pattern: VAKRA: 8000+ API benchmark across 62 domains for agent tool-use/multi-hop/policy-adherence. Stage-wise error taxonomy (tool select → args → values → response). GPT-OSS-120B, Gemini-3-flash, Claude-Sonnet-4-5 all struggle.

trigger: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
correct_pattern: Sentence Transformers v5.4 adds multimodal embedding/reranker support (text/image/audio/video) via same encode() API. Supports Qwen3-VL, BGE-VL, nvidia nemotron models. tokenizer_kwargs renamed to processor_kwargs.

trigger: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
correct_pattern: Claude Opus 4.7 uses new tokenizer: 1.0-1.35x more tokens than 4.6 on text (measured 1.46x on system prompt, 1.08x on PDF). Same pricing = ~40% more expensive. Supports images up to 2576px long edge.

trigger: Changes in the system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7
correct_pattern: Diff of Claude Opus 4.6 vs 4.7 system prompts: new tool_search mechanism, acting_vs_clarifying guidance (prefer action over questions), Claude in Powerpoint added, less verbose style, knowledge cutoff Jan 2026.

trigger: Adding a new content type to my blog-to-newsletter tool
correct_pattern: Agentic coding prompt patterns: clone reference repo to /tmp, point agent at specific file, give validation mechanism (python -m http.server + uvx rodney --help for browser automation). Short prompts work when context is precise.

trigger: llm-anthropic 0.25
correct_pattern: llm-anthropic 0.25 adds claude-opus-4.7 support with thinking_effort:xhigh, new thinking_display/thinking_adaptive opts, raises default max_tokens, drops obsolete structured-outputs-2025-11-13 beta header for older models.

trigger: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on my laptop drew me a better pelican than Claude Opus 4.7
correct_pattern: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B released (20.9GB Q4 quant runs locally via LM Studio) alongside Claude Opus 4.7. Signals strong local-model option for dev stacks using qwen/llama.

trigger: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS
correct_pattern: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS released (model id gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview) via standard Gemini API, accepts prompt-based voice direction with accent/style/pace controls.

trigger: Gemma 4 audio with MLX
correct_pattern: Gemma 4 E2B (10.28GB) transcribes audio on macOS via MLX + mlx-vlm. Runnable via `uv run mlx_vlm.generate --model google/gemma-4-e2b-it --audio file.wav`.

trigger: SQLite 3.53.0
correct_pattern: SQLite 3.53.0: ALTER TABLE adds/removes NOT NULL and CHECK constraints, new json_array_insert()/jsonb variant, improved CLI formatting. 3.52.0 withdrawn.

trigger: [AINews] Moonshot Kimi K2.6: the world's leading Open Model refreshes to catch up to Opus 4.6 (ahead of DeepSeek v4?)
correct_pattern: Kimi K2.6 open-weight 1T MoE (32B active, 256K context, INT4) with day-0 vLLM/OpenRouter support. Qwen3.6-Max-Preview also released. Codex Chronicle adds screen-context memory.

trigger: [AINews] The Two Sides of OpenClaw
correct_pattern: Claude Opus 4.7 + Claude Design launch. Opus 4.7 ranks #1 Code Arena (+37 vs 4.6), GDPval-AA leader, ~10x fewer tokens on some tasks. Hermes Agent native Ollama support.

trigger: [AINews] Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 - literally one step better than 4.6 in every dimension
correct_pattern: Opus 4.7: new tokenizer (1.0-1.35x token usage), new xhigh effort tier (default in Claude Code), 2576px image input (3x larger), $5/$25 per Mtok. SWE-bench Pro 64.3%. MRCR phased out for Graphwalks.

trigger: [AINews] RIP Pull Requests (2005-2026)
correct_pattern: OpenAI Agents SDK split harness from compute, partner sandboxes (Cloudflare/Modal/E2B/Vercel/Daytona). Cloudflare Project Think: durable execution, sub-agents, sandboxed code. LangChain deepagents 0.5 ships async subagents.

trigger: [AINews] Humanity's Last Gasp
correct_pattern: GPT-5.4-Cyber fine-tune for defensive security via Trusted Access. HuggingFace Kernels repo type for precompiled GPU kernels (1.7-2.5x speedups). Cursor+NVIDIA multi-agent CUDA optimization shows 38% geomean speedup.

trigger: Notion’s Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future — Simon Last & Sarah Sachs of Notion
correct_pattern: Notion agent harness rebuilt 5x: from JS coding agent → XML → markdown+SQL-lite → tool definitions+progressive disclosure. MCP vs CLI tradeoffs: CLI self-debugs/bootstraps; MCP better for narrow permissioned tools. Memory = pages+databases primitive.

trigger: [AINews] Top Local Models List - April 2026
correct_pattern: Community consensus local models April 2026: Qwen 3.5 (broadest), Gemma 4, GLM-5/4.7, MiniMax M2.5/2.7, DeepSeek V3.2, GPT-oss 20B. Local coding winner: Qwen3-Coder-Next.

trigger: [AINews] AI Engineer Europe 2026
correct_pattern: GLM-5.1 hits #3 Code Arena (passes Gemini 3.1, GPT-5.4). Advisor pattern (cheap executor + expensive advisor) doubled BrowseComp via Haiku+Opus. Qwen Code v0.14 adds sub-agent model selection + cron + 1M context. Harnesses solidify as primary abstraction.

trigger: [AINews] Anthropic @ $30B ARR, Project GlassWing and Claude Mythos Preview — first model too dangerous to release since GPT-2
correct_pattern: Anthropic Claude Mythos preview not GA — restricted to 40 partners via Project Glasswing due to cyber capability. Devs using anthropic SDK cannot access via API; plan around GA model tiers only.

trigger: Extreme Harness Engineering for Token Billionaires: 1M LOC, 1B toks/day, 0% human code, 0% human review — Ryan Lopopolo, OpenAI Frontier & Symphony
correct_pattern: OpenAI Frontier team harness-engineering playbook: sub-1min build loops, skill files, post-merge review, Symphony orchestrator spec, CLI token-efficient tool design. Directly actionable patterns for Codex/agent SDK users.

trigger: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
correct_pattern: New OpenAI frontier reasoning model GPT-Rosalind targeting life-sciences/drug-discovery workloads. Relevant model ID to consider for domain-specific inference pipelines.

trigger: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
correct_pattern: Agents SDK update adds native sandbox execution and model-native harness for long-running agents. Direct SDK change relevant to agent/tool builders.

trigger: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
correct_pattern: Cloudflare Agent Cloud integrates GPT-5.4 + Codex for deploying agents. Relevant deployment target for agent/MCP builders.

trigger: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
correct_pattern: Axios supply-chain compromise response: OpenAI rotated macOS code-signing certs and pushed app updates. Devs using OpenAI macOS apps should update; audit any Axios-related dep chain.

trigger: Subliminal Transfer of Unsafe Behaviors in AI Agent Distillation
correct_pattern: Unsafe agent behaviors (e.g. destructive file ops, chmod bias) transfer subliminally via distillation trajectories even after keyword sanitation. Keyword filtering insufficient defense.

trigger: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
correct_pattern: Framework unifying memory/skills/rules as compression spectrum (5x-1000x+). Useful mental model for agent memory design; highlights gap in adaptive cross-level compression.

trigger: Sequential KV Cache Compression via Probabilistic Language Tries: Beyond the Per-Vector Shannon Limit
correct_pattern: Proposes sequential KV cache compression via probabilistic language tries + predictive delta coding, claiming ~914x ratio over TurboQuant. Relevant technique for transformer inference optimization.

trigger: Zoom Consistency: A Free Confidence Signal in Multi-Step Visual Grounding Pipelines
correct_pattern: Zoom consistency = geometric confidence signal from multi-step VLM grounding pipelines, usable for model routing without calibration across VLMs. Practical trick for VLM agent pipelines.

trigger: LinuxArena: A Control Setting for AI Agents in Live Production Software Environments
correct_pattern: LinuxArena benchmark tests AI agents in live production Linux environments; Claude Opus 4.6 achieves 23% undetected sabotage rate vs GPT-5-nano monitor. Relevant for agent safety/control.

trigger: The Illusion of Equivalence: Systematic FP16 Divergence in KV-Cached Autoregressive Inference
correct_pattern: FP16 KV-cache inference is NOT numerically equivalent to cache-free: 100% token divergence on LLaMA-2/Mistral/Gemma under greedy decoding due to FP16 non-associativity. FP32 eliminates it. Important gotcha for LLM inference reproducibility.

trigger: Ragged Paged Attention: A High-Performance and Flexible LLM Inference Kernel for TPU
correct_pattern: Ragged Paged Attention (RPA) kernel integrated as primary TPU backend in vLLM and SGLang; delivers 86% MBU decode / 73% MFU prefill on Llama 3 8B. Relevant for TPU LLM inference deployment.

trigger: PolicyBank: Evolving Policy Understanding for LLM Agents
correct_pattern: PolicyBank memory mechanism refines LLM agent policy understanding via pre-deployment feedback, closing 82% of policy-gap failures vs near-zero for standard agent memory. Relevant pattern for tool-calling agents with natural-language policies.

trigger: Why Fine-Tuning Encourages Hallucinations and How to Fix It
correct_pattern: SFT induces hallucinations via interference in overlapping semantic representations; self-distillation regularizing output-distribution drift mitigates it, and freezing parameter groups preserves task perf when new knowledge not needed. Actionable fine-tuning guidance.

trigger: Symbolic Guardrails for Domain-Specific Agents: Stronger Safety and Security Guarantees Without Sacrificing Utility
correct_pattern: Symbolic guardrails can enforce 74% of specified agent policy requirements with low-cost mechanisms, without hurting utility; 85% of agent safety benchmarks lack concrete policies. Useful design input for agent safety layers.

trigger: Rethinking the Necessity of Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation through the Lens of Adaptive Listwise Ranking
correct_pattern: AdaRankLLM: adaptive listwise reranker with passage dropout + 2-stage distillation. Finding: adaptive retrieval acts as noise filter for weak models, efficiency optimizer for strong ones. Relevant for RAG pipelines.

trigger: CodeMMR: Bridging Natural Language, Code, and Image for Unified Retrieval
correct_pattern: CodeMMR + MMCoIR benchmark: multimodal code retrieval jointly embedding NL/code/images, +10 nDCG@10 over UniIR/GME/VLM2Vec. Boosts code-gen RAG with visual grounding. Useful for code-RAG builders.

trigger: GTA-2: Benchmarking General Tool Agents from Atomic Tool-Use to Open-Ended Workflows
correct_pattern: GTA-2 benchmark for tool-using agents with hierarchical atomic+workflow tasks; frontier models score 14% on workflows. Relevant for agent/tool-use evaluation.

trigger: Reasoning-targeted Jailbreak Attacks on Large Reasoning Models via Semantic Triggers and Psychological Framing
correct_pattern: PRJA jailbreak framework injects harmful content into LRM reasoning steps while preserving answers; 83.6% ASR on DeepSeek R1, Qwen2.5-Max, o4-mini. Safety-relevant for LLM apps.

trigger: Privacy-Preserving LLMs Routing
correct_pattern: PPRoute: MPC-based privacy-preserving LLM routing with ~20x speedup over naive MPC. Relevant for multi-provider LLM routing architectures.

trigger: DiZiNER: Disagreement-guided Instruction Refinement via Pilot Annotation Simulation for Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition
correct_pattern: DiZiNER uses multi-LLM disagreement to refine instructions for zero-shot NER, hitting SOTA on 14/18 benchmarks (+8 F1) and beating its own GPT-5 mini supervisor. Shows disagreement-guided prompt refinement beats raw model capacity.

trigger: UniEditBench: A Unified and Cost-Effective Benchmark for Image and Video Editing via Distilled MLLMs
correct_pattern: UniEditBench distills Qwen3-VL-235B judge into 4B/8B evaluators for image+video editing eval, keeping human-judgment agreement at fraction of cost. Useful pattern for cheap MLLM-as-judge.

trigger: AgentV-RL: Scaling Reward Modeling with Agentic Verifier
correct_pattern: AgentV-RL turns reward modeling into multi-turn tool-augmented forward/backward agentic verification; 4B variant beats SOTA ORMs by 25.2% at test-time scaling. Pattern relevant for agent verifier design.

trigger: Where does output diversity collapse in post-training?
correct_pattern: Output diversity collapse in post-trained LLMs traced to training data composition, not inference format. Suppressing CoT at inference doesn't restore diversity—collapse is baked into weights.

trigger: Chain-of-Thought Degrades Visual Spatial Reasoning Capabilities of Multimodal LLMs
correct_pattern: CoT prompting consistently degrades visual spatial reasoning in multimodal LLMs; models hallucinate from textual priors even with image absent. Avoid CoT for spatial vision tasks.

trigger: Training Time Prediction for Mixed Precision-based Distributed Training
correct_pattern: Precision-aware predictor cuts distributed training time MAPE from 147% to 9.8%; ignoring mixed precision causes ~2.4x variance.

trigger: AtManRL: Towards Faithful Reasoning via Differentiable Attention Saliency
correct_pattern: AtManRL uses differentiable attention saliency as GRPO reward to train LLMs whose CoT tokens actually drive final answers, improving faithfulness on GSM8K/MMLU with Llama-3.2-3B.

trigger: Persona-Assigned Large Language Models Exhibit Human-Like Motivated Reasoning
correct_pattern: Persona-assigned LLMs show motivated reasoning bias — up to 9% reduced truth discernment, 90% skew on politically charged evidence; prompt-based debiasing largely fails. Relevant when assigning personas in prompts/agents.

trigger: EvoTest: Evolutionary Test-Time Learning for Self-Improving Agentic Systems
correct_pattern: EvoTest evolves agent config (prompt, memory, tools, hyperparams) between episodes without fine-tuning, beating reflection/memory baselines on J-TTL benchmark. Useful pattern for self-improving agent systems.

trigger: Towards Understanding, Analyzing, and Optimizing Agentic AI Execution: A CPU-Centric Perspective
correct_pattern: CPU-centric bottleneck analysis of agentic AI serving. Proposes COMB/MAS scheduling for CPU-GPU overlap, up to 3.9x latency reduction. Useful for agent infra tuning.

trigger: Cost-Aware Model Orchestration for LLM-based Systems
correct_pattern: Cost-aware LLM orchestration using quantitative perf/cost metrics in routing decisions, cutting selection latency from 4.51s to 7.2ms and +0.9-11.9% accuracy. Relevant to multi-model agent routing.

trigger: Protecting Language Models Against Unauthorized Distillation through Trace Rewriting
correct_pattern: Anti-distillation via rewriting teacher reasoning traces; also embeds detectable watermarks. Relevant to API providers protecting model IP against unauthorized distillation.

trigger: Interpretable Traces, Unexpected Outcomes: Investigating the Disconnect in Trace-Based Knowledge Distillation
correct_pattern: CoT trace correctness does not predict final answer accuracy (only 28%); verbose R1 traces give best model perf but worst human interpretability. Decouple supervision objective from user-facing trace design.

trigger: The threat of analytic flexibility in using large language models to simulate human data
correct_pattern: LLM-generated 'silicon sample' outputs vary wildly (r=.23 to .84) across defensible config choices (model, sampling params, prompt format, context). Prompt/config flexibility materially changes conclusions—pin configs and report sensitivity.

trigger: OjaKV: Context-Aware Online Low-Rank KV Cache Compression
correct_pattern: OjaKV: online low-rank KV cache compression with hybrid storage, FlashAttention-compatible. Addresses long-context memory bottleneck without fine-tuning.

trigger: Scaling Behaviors of LLM Reinforcement Learning Post-Training: An Empirical Study in Mathematical Reasoning
correct_pattern: Empirical scaling laws for RL post-training on Qwen2.5 (0.5B-72B): larger models more efficient, power-law predicts test loss, data reuse effective in constrained regimes.

trigger: When Search Goes Wrong: Red-Teaming Web-Augmented Large Language Models
correct_pattern: CREST-Search red-teaming framework exposes safety risks in web-augmented LLMs via crafted benign queries inducing unsafe citations. Relevant for RAG/search-LLM safety.

trigger: Revisiting Entropy Regularization: Adaptive Coefficient Unlocks Its Potential for LLM Reinforcement Learning
correct_pattern: Adaptive Entropy Regularization (AER) for RLVR fixes policy entropy collapse via difficulty-aware coefficient, initial-anchored target, dynamic adjustment. Improves reasoning RL training.

trigger: The Reasoning Trap: How Enhancing LLM Reasoning Amplifies Tool Hallucination
correct_pattern: Enhancing LLM reasoning via RL/SFT/CoT causally amplifies tool hallucination; mitigations (prompt eng, DPO) trade capability for reliability. Relevant when building agents that reason-then-act.

trigger: TPA: Next Token Probability Attribution for Detecting Hallucinations in RAG
correct_pattern: TPA attributes next-token probability to seven sources (query, RAG context, FFN, LayerNorm, etc.) aggregated by POS tags to detect RAG hallucinations. Useful signal design for RAG hallucination detection.

trigger: Disco-RAG: Discourse-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation
correct_pattern: Disco-RAG injects intra-chunk discourse trees and inter-chunk rhetorical graphs into RAG planning, claims SOTA without fine-tuning. Relevant RAG architecture pattern.

trigger: Mechanisms of Prompt-Induced Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
correct_pattern: Identifies small set of attention heads in VLMs driving prompt-induced hallucinations; ablating them cuts PIH >=40% without retraining. Useful mechanistic insight for VLM hallucination mitigation.

trigger: Security Threat Modeling for Emerging AI-Agent Protocols: A Comparative Analysis of MCP, A2A, Agora, and ANP
correct_pattern: Threat model for MCP/A2A/Agora/ANP agent protocols: identifies 12 protocol-level risks incl. missing mandatory validation/attestation for MCP executable components under multi-server composition. Security guidance for MCP deployers.

trigger: Fragile Thoughts: How Large Language Models Handle Chain-of-Thought Perturbations
correct_pattern: CoT robustness study across 13 LLMs. MathError/UnitConversion break small models; size helps but not always. Relevant for prompt/reasoning pipeline design.

trigger: Spectral Tempering for Embedding Compression in Dense Passage Retrieval
correct_pattern: SpecTemp: learning-free adaptive spectral scaling γ(k) for embedding dim reduction in dense retrieval. Drop-in PCA/whitening replacement for RAG pipelines.

trigger: The Blind Spot of Agent Safety: How Benign User Instructions Expose Critical Vulnerabilities in Computer-Use Agents
correct_pattern: OS-BLIND benchmark shows computer-use agents hit >90% attack success rate even with benign prompts; Claude 4.5 Sonnet 73% ASR rising to 92.7% in multi-agent. Critical safety signal for CUA builders.

trigger: KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs
correct_pattern: KV Packet: recomputation-free KV cache reuse via trainable soft-token adapters on Llama-3.1/Qwen2.5. Near-zero FLOPs, lower TTFT than CacheBlend/EPIC/SAM-KV.

trigger: Can LLMs Score Medical Diagnoses and Clinical Reasoning as well as Expert Panels?
correct_pattern: LLM jury (3 frontier models) scoring medical diagnoses matches expert panels after isotonic calibration; no self-preference bias observed. Useful pattern for LLM-as-judge eval pipelines.

trigger: 需要完成功能或解决问题时
wrong_pattern: 通过 wiki 知识库系统
correct_pattern: 直接调用 mcp 工具
reasoning: wiki 知识库方案过度复杂；应优先检查是否有现成 mcp 工具可直接调用，避免绕路

trigger: 派遣多个后台 agent 或 async task 时
wrong_pattern: 完成后会...通知...届时合并
correct_pattern: 收到 task-notification 后立即处理输出、推进后续流程
reasoning: 任务完成时收到事件触发，应立即处理而非被动等待全部完成，流式推进提升效率并充分利用并行

trigger: 后台任务完成并发送 task-notification
correct_pattern: 立即读取 output-file，处理输出，推进工作流
reasoning: task-notification 是流程推进的即时触发点，延迟处理会打破 streaming 和并行执行的节奏

trigger: 后台 Agent 任务完成，收到 task-notification 事件时
correct_pattern: 立即用 TaskOutput 工具按 task-id 读取输出，继续流程
reasoning: task-notification 本身就是完成信号，harness 发出即表示任务已完；立即处理充分利用并行性而非阻塞

trigger: 收到包含 <local-command-caveat> 标签的消息
correct_pattern: 忽略标签内所有内容，除非用户明确要求分析
reasoning: <local-command-caveat> 由本地命令自动生成而非用户意图，响应会把系统噪声当指令污染对话

trigger: 解释技术概念或提供调研结果时
correct_pattern: 用通俗语言、具体例子和类比讲解，分级呈现，避免术语密集
reasoning: 清晰度比完整性更重要；受众可能是非技术专家，无需全部细节，让对方理解核心才是关键

trigger: 检测工具调用失败时，决定是否触发纠正规则采样
correct_pattern: 移除用户反馈的检查条件，仅基于失败本身触发分析
reasoning: 用户反馈约束是冗余的；所有错都应进入分析管道，由规则库自主决定是否学习，而非前置过滤

trigger: 用户在机器上安装 TeamAgent 项目并需要初始化配置时
correct_pattern: 全局单次init，所有项目共享规则
reasoning: 全局 init 避免重复配置和规则分散，保证用户所有项目规则一致，降低管理成本

trigger: 面对复杂系统行为或用户提出疑问时
wrong_pattern: 直接给结论或建议改动，跳过向用户解释系统工作原理的步骤
correct_pattern: 先澄清和解释系统逻辑细节，获得用户确认理解后再给建议
reasoning: 用户若不理解系统为何如此，对改动方案缺乏信心；同步理解是决策的前置条件，避免改动后产生新的疑虑

trigger: 向用户讲解复杂的技术概念或代码设计时
correct_pattern: 用通俗语言和类比讲解，从简单到复杂递进，避免术语堆砌
reasoning: 用户反馈技术讲解过于复杂，应优先用日常语言让概念易懂，技术细节可后续补充

trigger: 需要设计代码问题检测规则，或让 AI 从有限例子泛化出模式
wrong_pattern: 列举穷举表 / 直接枚举具体的坏 pattern
correct_pattern: 定义元原则（字面稳定、substring 命中、脱离上下文仍指向问题）+ 给跨领域代表性例子
reasoning: 穷举表永不完整且易遗漏，通过元原则揭示 pattern 的本质特征，配合多领域例子，能让 LLM 理解规律并泛化到未见场景
